quoteLast: some of our ships upon our larboard beam began firing, as did the rest of the ships as they came up with the enemy.
title: Memoirs and Correspondence of Admiral Lord de Saumarez. Vol II
author: Ross, John, Sir, 1777-1856

quoteFirst: 1.21 A. M., from Plymouth: “NC-4 left Lisbon 6.23 (New York
quoteLast: ), May 30, and landed Mondego River, getting underway and proceeding to Ferrol, where landed at 16.46 (12.46 New York time). Destroyers standing by NC-4; will proceed to Plymouth to-morrow if weather permits.”
title: Aircraft
author: David, Evan John, 1877-1961
